heading: Seamen’s clothing
label: 11110 Seamen’s clothing
text: The clothing of a seaman is exempt from attachments and liens. A person detaining a seaman’s clothing shall be fined not more than $500, imprisoned for not more than 6 months, or both.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)1111046:563Section 11110 exempts seamen’s clothing from attachments and liens. It also provides a penalty for violations.
